name: Pasta with Light Basil Pesto
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Packed stemmled fresh basil leaves
1/2 cup Reduced chicken broth (Boil 1 cup down to 1/2)
Cooked pasta, either angel hair, spaghetti or linguine
recipeInstructions:
1. Put all ingredients (except pasta) into a food processor fitted with the metal blade.
2. Pulse the machine on and off rapidly several times until coarsely chopped.
3. Scrape down the work bowl.
4. Process continuously until the sauce is smooth. If the pesto seems too thick, pulse in a little hot water.
5. Toss with cooked pasta immediately after draining.
